caption:
This is one of the best sushi bowl (tuna) in Tokyo 🐟✨

📍 Location: Kappo Shishikura
Ebisu, Shibuya, Tokyo

🕒 Hours:
11:30 AM – 2:30 PM, 6:00 PM – 12:00 AM
Open daily

💰 Signature Bowls:
– “KAGAYAKI” Bluefin Trinity Bowl (Akami / Chutoro /
Otoro): ¥8,000（$53）
– “Emperor Bowl” Tuna & Uni Masterpiece: ¥18,000（$
120）

⚠️ Reservation required via TableCheck

#tokyo #ebisu #tuna #bluefintuna #kaisendon
#sushibowl #japanesefood #tokyodining #asukunavi
#localgem #pr
transcript: What's the best restaurant in Tokyo? Shishikura? Why? Kaisen Donが最高? Ok! Let's go! If you are looking for the best restaurant in Tokyo, check this out. Shishikura is a hidden local Japanese restaurant where the chef Shishikura-san uses fresh never frozen roofing tuna. Serving ultra fresh sushi bowls you'll never forget. Here we go. This is the bluefin trinity bowl. Look at this beautiful bluefin tuna. Pure tuna umami and it melts instantly in your mouth. And if you are a uni lover, you also have to try the ultimate tuna and uni bowl. Made with premium Hokkaido uni, it creates the perfect fusion with tuna. Comment tuna for more info.

transcript_segments.text: What's the best restaurant in Tokyo?
If you are looking for the best restaurant in Tokyo, check this out.
Shishikura is a hidden local Japanese restaurant where the chef Shishikura-san uses fresh never frozen roofing tuna.
Serving ultra fresh sushi bowls you'll never forget.
Here we go. This is the bluefin trinity bowl. Look at this beautiful bluefin tuna.
Pure tuna umami and it melts instantly in your mouth.
And if you are a uni lover, you also have to try the ultimate tuna and uni bowl.
Made with premium Hokkaido uni, it creates the perfect fusion with tuna.
